propositions: The plan-review sidecar's _slim step drops pass-1 evidence and scenarios fields, losing a finding's grounding quotes.
The resolved block_threshold and blocking_enabled a finding was judged against are discarded at decision time, so auditors cannot see the applied decision boundary.
A new schema version plan_review_result_v2 persists per-finding evidence, scenarios, block_threshold, and blocking_enabled while keeping all existing fields and all-buckets pooling unchanged.
The pass-3 decide functions must expose the resolved block_threshold/blocking_enabled from ThresholdResolver on each finding's decision output.
latest_review_result must read both v1 and v2 sidecars, treating missing threshold/evidence fields as not recorded for v1, with no backfill.
